CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Posted") || ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Reply Received") || ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Reply Accepted"), IF(!ISBLANK(End_Date__c) && End_Date__c = TODAY()-1, TRUE, IF(!ISBLANK(Start_Date__c) && Start_Date__c + 21 = TODAY(), TRUE, IF(DATEVALUE(CreatedDate)+21 = TODAY(), TRUE, FALSE))), FALSE)
CustomField.label: Expired Yesterday
